C_Cpp.clang_format_fallbackStyle: { BasedOnStyle: LLVM, IndentWidth: 4, UseTab: Never, BreakBeforeBraces: Attach, SortIncludes: false, ColumnLimit: 0, IndentCaseLabels: true, AllowShortFunctionsOnASingleLine: All, AllowShortIfStatementsOnASingleLine: AllIfsAndElse, SpacesInParentheses: false, SpaceBeforeParens: ControlStatementsExceptControlMacros }
